headline: Starbucks Is Still A Dog
summary: Starbucks’ (NASDAQ: SBUX) stock is down 10% in the last year, while the S&P 500 is 12% higher. Over five years, the stock is down 20% while the S&P is up 62%. Recently, The Wall Street Journal wrote that “Starbucks Has Its Shine Back, CEO Brian Niccol Says.” Not so. Niccol began his tenure as ... Starbucks Is Still A Dog
